bio.zh:
👋 你好，我是 JUNK_DOGE。

动效设计师 · 创意开发者 · 开源爱好者

目前是一名实习中的动效设计师，专注于视频制作、视觉设计与创意工具开发。业余时间会开发 AE 插件、视觉增强工具以及 AI 工作流，希望让创作变得更高效、更有趣。

💼 如果有合作或委托需求，欢迎通过 QQ / 微信 / Email 联系我。

⭐ 如果我的插件或开源项目对你有所帮助，欢迎在 GitHub 上点个 Star！你的支持是我持续创作的动力。
bio.en:
👋 Hi, I'm JUNK_DOGE.

Motion Designer · Creative Developer · Open Source Enthusiast

I'm currently working as a Motion Design Intern, focusing on video production, visual design, and creative tool development. In my spare time, I build After Effects plugins, visual enhancement tools, and AI-powered workflows to make content creation more efficient and enjoyable.

💼 Available for collaborations and commissions. Feel free to reach out via QQ, WeChat, or Email.

⭐ If you find my plugins or open-source projects helpful, I'd really appreciate a ⭐ on GitHub. Your support keeps me creating!

lead.zh:
提供 PV / MV / BGA 等视觉内容定制。
欢迎带着你的音乐、企划或创意前来交流，我会与你一起将它们转化为完整的视觉表达。

关于报价
我不会以项目是否盈利来区分商业与非商业。
报价主要取决于是否涉及保密协议（NDA）、作品版权/所有权转让，以及项目规模与制作复杂度；若不涉及任何法律协议，一律按非商业标准报价。
lead.en:
Custom Visual Production

I offer custom visual production for PV, MV, BGA, and other motion graphics projects.

Whether you have a piece of music, a project concept, or just an idea, feel free to reach out. I'd love to work with you to bring it to life through compelling visuals.

Commercial Project Criteria

Whether a project is considered commercial depends solely on the legal agreements involved, not on whether the client makes a profit.

Projects involving an NDA or copyright/ownership transfer are treated as commercial. Otherwise, they are quoted under the non-commercial standard.

tiers.k: 完全商业项目 | 移交作品法律所有权

misc.homeTagline: 文字 × 映像 × 代码 — PV / VJ / 创意开发
